series_metadata.series_description: Projected budgets prepared prior to each fiscal year at the local level to project expenditures and used to track monthly expenditures. Records may include: Request for Budget Changes; Document Changes; Information that supports budget requests; budget request FY forms used to project funds for upcoming administrative and case service funds for new fiscal year; HR budget request forms projecting funds for upcoming trainings and meetings; supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: seven (7) state fiscal years from completion date and when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: seven (7) state fiscal years from completion date and when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
